title: Delicate Floral Korean Gelatin Bowl
description: A pillowy, fragrant dessert that layers subtle floral notes in a chilled stone bowl, perfect for a halal-friendly Korean treat.
instructions: Sift the gelatin powder into a small bowl and pour 200 ml of cold water over it to bloom for 5 minutes.
Heat the bloomed gelatin mixture gently over low heat until the gelatin dissolves completely, stirring until clear.
Stir in 10 g of maple syrup until fully incorporated, then let the mixture cool to 40°C.
Add the dried rose and violet petals to the gelatin, mixing lightly to distribute the color and aroma.
Divide the gelatin mixture evenly between two pre‑chilled stone bowls.
Top each bowl with 15 g of pomegranate seeds and 5 g of ginkgo nuts for texture.
Place the bowls in the refrigerator and chill for 60 minutes until firm.
Just before serving, place a small piece of edible gold leaf on each bowl for a subtle finish.
